rationale: The cited paper is used as a methodological source for probing and interpreting an interaction in the citing paper, not just as background reading. In Experiment 4b, the authors explicitly report using spotlight and floodlight analysis and reference Spiller et al. (2013) when identifying the Johnson-Neyman point where the effect is no longer significant. This citation therefore plays a functional role in the analysis and reporting of moderated effects.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s spotlight/floodlight simple-effects framework to analyze a moderation result, including a Johnson-Neyman region-of-significance interpretation in Experiment 4b.
